wiki.title: Knowledge Base
wiki.description: AI-built, page-centric knowledge bases reusable by agents
wiki.name: Name
wiki.llmModelTip: Used to summarize materials and build knowledge pages; required after creation
wiki.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this knowledge base?
wiki.uploadHint: Click or drag a file here to upload
wiki.generationRulesTip: Extra rules guiding AI page generation (terminology, tone, structure)
wiki.generationRulesPlaceholder: e.g. use a unified glossary; each page includes a 'Steps' section
wiki.webSyncTip: Periodically re-fetch and re-parse web materials; changes trigger a safe update
wiki.riskAutoApplyTip: AI-only pages take effect right after build; off = pending review
wiki.riskRequireReviewTip: Unsafe-merge / conflict changes go to Check & Review
wiki.rebuildAllTip: Archive AI-only pages and regenerate per current Schema (human edits preserved)
wiki.rebuildAllConfirm: Rebuild everything? AI-only pages are archived and regenerated per Schema.
wiki.archiveTip: Archived KB is read-only and excluded from build & retrieval
wiki.deleteTip: Once you delete this knowledge base, there is no going back. Please be certain. All its materials, pages and build records will be permanently removed.
wiki.qaEmpty: No messages yet. Start a conversation!
wiki.qaError: Failed to answer, please try again
wiki.qaPlaceholder: Ask a question about this knowledge base…
wiki.helpBasicDesc: The KB's name, reasoning model and owning organization. The model summarizes materials and builds knowledge pages.
wiki.helpPurposeDesc: Purpose describes target readers and scenarios; Schema defines knowledge types and the page skeleton, guiding how AI organizes knowledge.
wiki.helpPurposeTip: Write the purpose first, then agree on the schema; changing the schema affects later builds.
wiki.helpGenerationDesc: Controls the language and extra rules for AI page generation; rules are injected into every generation as a prompt.
wiki.helpWebSyncDesc: Schedule refresh for web materials to keep snapshots current; too short an interval may trigger rate limiting on the target site.
wiki.helpRiskDesc: Constrains auto-apply and human review for risky changes; with review on, AI update suggestions must be confirmed in Check & Review.
wiki.helpDangerDesc: The actions below are irreversible or wide-reaching. Proceed with caution.
wiki.typeLockedTip: Page type cannot be changed after creation
wiki.tagsPlaceholder: Press Enter to add a tag

settings.selectedParams: Please ensure that the selected channels parameters are configured.
settings.description: Select the corresponding skills for the bot, configure the relevant information, and then publish.
settings.publishTip: After the robot is published, it will be updated on the selected channels.
settings.noChannelHasBeenOpened: No channel has been opened yet.
settings.noSkillHasBeenSelected: No skill has been selected yet.

logs.searchUser: Please enter the user name to search...
logs.title: Conversation Logs
logs.description: You can view the log records of the conversation between the user and the robot, and restore the conversation scene.

form.modelTip: Please select the Rasa small model to be used by this application for filtering and closing simple questions, reducing API calls and token consumption of the large model.
form.replicaCountTip: The number of Pilot instances running the AI application. Increasing the number of instances enhances the fault tolerance and availability of the application. The default is 1.
form.usageGroupTip: Usage organizations can chat with / call this app via API; management organizations are auto-included and cannot be removed.
form.name: Name

studio.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this studio?
studio.offDeleteConfirm: Please go offline before deleting the bot.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.totalConversationDesc: This counts the total number of conversations by all users of the Bot within the selected time range. Each question and answer counts as one conversation round, and Bot testing questions and answers are not included in the statistics.
statistics.description: The operational statistics of the Bot are used to analyze the usage and invocation of the robot by users.
statistics.totalActiveUserDesc: This counts the number of distinct users who engaged in conversations with the Bot within the selected time range.

studio.chatflowDesc: Chatflow enables the orchestration of agent capabilities, triggered through APIs or scheduled executions.
studio.pilotDesc: An application created based on Rasa, supporting external channels such as chat interfaces, WeChat Work, DingTalk, etc.

channel.title: Channel
channel.description: Built-in with multiple messaging channels, allowing the bot to interact with users through these channels.

studio.lobeChatDesc: Supports connecting to the LobeChat web interface as an interaction channel with users.

tool.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this tool?
tool.label: Label
tool.title: Tool

chat.clearConfirm: You are about to clear the conversation. After clearing, you will not be able to retrieve it. Do you want to clear the current conversation?
chat.connectionError: Connection error, please try again later
chat.removeAnnotationConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this annotation?
chat.choiceMaxSelect: You can select at most {max} option(s)

secret.title: API Secret Keys
secret.content: To prevent API abuse, protect your API Key.
secret.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this secret key?

form.sharedTooltip: Quota shared among individuals in the organization.
form.uniformTooltip: Quota uniformly applied to each individual in the organization.

manageQuota.content: The administrator can set different quotas for different roles.
manageQuota.title: Manage Quota
manageQuota.name: NAME

myQuota.title: My Quota
myQuota.content: Show my total quota usage. Please contact the administrator to apply for an increase when the quota is insufficient.

form.problemOptimizationTip: When enabled, the LLM model will optimize and process user questions to achieve more accurate query results.
form.guideTip: An initialization message sent at the start of each conversation. Supports standard Markdown syntax and additional tags. [Quick Key]: Users can click to send this question directly.
form.guideNotSupportedInExternalApp: Guide messages are not supported in external applications
form.planTypeScene:
Project Management: Decompose tasks and track execution status at each stage.
Product Development: Develop R&D plans and coordinate execution across multiple departments.
Daily Planning: Such as travel route design and budget arrangement.
form.toolsTypeDesc: Combines reasoning and action, solving tasks through logical deduction and tool invocation, suitable for scenarios requiring real-time interaction and multi-step operations.
form.promptTip: You can input relevant prompts to guide the model in generating specific responses by providing context or questions to adjust the direction and quality of the output content.
form.temperatureTip: Used to control the randomness and creativity of text generation; a low temperature produces more definitive results, while a high temperature increases the diversity and randomness of the text.
form.qaTypeScene:
IT Operations Document Retrieval: Quickly query configuration and operation documents.
Standard Operating Procedures: Provide standard operating steps and precautions.
Training and Onboarding: Answer new employee questions and assist in learning.
form.qaTypeDesc: Combines retrieval and generation technologies to retrieve relevant information from external knowledge bases and generate accurate Q&A content, suitable for dynamic knowledge Q&A in open domains.
form.toolsTypeScene:
Data Analysis: Perform real-time statistics or analysis using computational tools.
Automated Office: Handle complex tasks like scheduling and email classification.
Enhanced Q&A: Combine computation or search tools to answer multi-layered questions.
form.complexTypeDesc: Simulates multi-step decision paths through tree search algorithms, suitable for high-complexity, high-uncertainty decision scenarios.
form.complexTypeScene:
Fault Diagnosis Decision Tree: Select different troubleshooting paths based on symptoms.
Cross-System Operation Decisions: Choose systems and tools to execute tasks based on conditions.
Resource Adjustment Decisions: Select scaling or downsizing paths based on load and configuration.
form.planTypeDesc: Decomposes tasks into multiple executable steps, completing complex tasks step by step, suitable for situations requiring hierarchical planning.
form.name: Name

skillParams.title: Prompt Parameters
skillParams.tip: Use {{paramName}} in the prompt to reference parameter values. Parameter names only allow letters, digits and underscores, and must start with a letter. For example, if the prompt is "You are {{role}}, reply in {{language}}", add parameters role=assistant and language=English; they will be substituted at execution time. Password-type parameters are stored encrypted.
skillParams.paramNameRule: Only letters, digits and underscores allowed; must start with a letter
skillParams.invalidKeyWarning: Invalid parameter names will be ignored. Names must start with a letter and contain only letters, digits, and underscores.
skillParams.emptyHint: Add placeholders like {{name}} in the prompt above
skillParams.emptySubHint: Matching parameters will appear here automatically

rules.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?

settings.description: LLM skills include the selection of LLM models and knowledge bases to optimize language understanding and generation processes. Users can also enable RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and conversation enhancement features to improve dialogue quality and accuracy.
settings.title: LLM Skill

skill.chatHistoryTip: The chat history count refers to the total number of interaction turns or messages between the user and the robot. This count can help the robot understand the context and enhance the relevance and coherence of its responses.
skill.ragToolRequired: When Tool is enabled, a tool must be selected.
skill.toolTip: The tool is used to provide the skill with the ability to obtain external data or perform operations. The specific tool to be called is determined autonomously by the large model.
skill.formValidationFailed: Form validation failed, please check required fields
skill.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this skill?

nodeConfig.requestBodyPlaceholder: Please enter JSON format request body
nodeConfig.uploadHint: Click or drag files to this area to upload
nodeConfig.falsePathDescription: Bottom right connection point: execution path when condition is False
nodeConfig.promptAppendTooltip: During workflow execution, additional instructions are needed to make the agent's execution more aligned with expectations and use cases
nodeConfig.classificationRulesTooltip: The system includes a built-in intent classification prompt. Content entered here will be appended as supplemental rules.
nodeConfig.apiLinkCopied: API link has been copied to clipboard
nodeConfig.truePathDescription: Top right connection point: execution path when condition is True
nodeConfig.uploadDescription: Support single or batch upload, only .md format files are supported
nodeConfig.openaiApiInfo: Provides an interface that can be called through OpenAI, supporting SSE streaming settings. After the canvas is saved, you can click the node to view the corresponding call parameters as follows
nodeConfig.memoryWriteModelTooltip: Model used for memory merging. Defaults to the memory space's default model, can be overridden here
nodeConfig.memoryWriteBatchSizeTooltip: Each trigger is cached first. Memory is summarized and written only after the accumulated count reaches this value; 1 means immediate write
nodeConfig.pleaseEnterMemoryWriteBatchSize: Please enter the batch write size
nodeConfig.uploadKnowledgeTooltip: During workflow execution, additional knowledge is needed, which will be input as prerequisites for agent execution
nodeConfig.dailyTip: Daily trigger. Set specific times below (multiple times supported, e.g., 7:00, 14:00, 18:00)
nodeConfig.dayMayNotExist: may not exist in some months
nodeConfig.aguiApiInfo: Provides an interface that can be called through AG-UI. After the canvas is saved, you can click the node to view the corresponding call parameters as follows
nodeConfig.moreDetails: For more detailed introduction, please go to
nodeConfig.restfulApiInfo: Provides REST interface for external systems/applications to call. After the canvas is saved, you can click the node to query the corresponding call parameters as follows
nodeConfig.intentTopicPlaceholder: Please enter classification topic name (one per line)

messages.deleteMultipleContent: Are you sure you want to delete the selected nodes? This action cannot be undone.
messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this node?
messages.deleteNodeContent: Are you sure you want to delete this node? This action cannot be undone.

chatflow.unsavedChangesWarning: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave this page?
chatflow.unsavedWorkflowChanges: You have unsaved workflow changes. Do you want to save before leaving?
chatflow.notificationAutoAttachmentsTip: Email notifications automatically include all attachments generated during this workflow run.

preview.detailPending: The current API has not returned detailed input or output for this node
preview.executeDrawerHint: After execution starts, this panel will close automatically and the live result will move to the right execution log.
preview.executionTransferred: Execution output has moved to the right execution log. You can keep watching the flow on the canvas.
preview.executingHint: Starting execution. The right preview panel will take over shortly.

vendor.pageDescription: Manage AI model vendors and their API access settings
vendor.nameHelp: Use a recognizable name, ideally including usage or department
vendor.apiBaseRequired: Please enter the API base URL
vendor.apiBasePlaceholder: Please enter the API base URL
vendor.apiBaseHelp: If you use a proxy or private deployment, enter its URL here
vendor.deleteConfirmContent: Deleting will remove provider "{name}" and its related settings.
vendor.validationError: Required user information is missing or invalid
vendor.basicDescription: Maintain the provider base configuration. Changes take effect immediately after saving.

group.name: Name
group.deleteConfirmContent: This action will delete the group

provider.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this model?

memory.title: Memory Management
memory.name: Name
memory.scopePersonalHint: Personal memory: Records to the user's personal memory on each workflow run
memory.scopeTeamHint: Organization memory: Records to the organization's shared memory on each workflow run
memory.writeRuleHint: Defines what content is worth writing and how memory should be organized.
memory.defaultModelHint: Used for memory extraction, structure judgment and merge updates.
memory.testInputDesc: Enter content from workflow runs that you want to persist into memory, to test how memory extracts, summarizes and updates.
memory.testWaitingHint: Click "Test" to see how a new memory entry would be generated.
memory.summaryDesc: Memory is used to continuously accumulate key information from conversations and analysis. The system can organize fault objects, root causes, remediation processes and conclusions into unified memory based on write rules, for follow-up queries, experience reuse and statistical analysis.
memory.testConfigRequired: Please configure write rule and default model first
memory.storageTypeHint: Select how memory data is stored
memory.storageTypeLocalDesc: Store memories in local PostgreSQL database
memory.storageTypeMem0Desc: Use Mem0 cloud service for semantic memory management
memory.storageTypeZepDesc: Use Zep cloud service for session memory management
memory.storageTypeCustomDesc: Use custom API for memory storage
memory.storageTypeCannotChange: Storage type cannot be changed after creation
